# CST Systems

> CST Systems este o companie IT din Târgu Mureș, România, specializată în soluții digitale complete pentru afaceri din România și din întreaga lume.

CST Systems is a professional IT software company based in Târgu Mureș, Romania.
We provide end-to-end digital solutions including custom software development,
presentation websites, e-commerce platforms, business automation, API integrations,
and IT consulting — for clients in Romania and worldwide.

## Services / Servicii

- **Custom Software Development / Software Custom**: Tailored web and desktop applications built specifically for client business needs, including ERP, CRM and specialized platforms.
- **Presentation Websites / Site-uri de Prezentare**: Modern, fast, mobile-responsive and SEO-optimized websites that convert visitors into clients.
- **E-commerce / Magazine Online**: Full-featured online stores with inventory management, Stripe/card payments, and optimized shopping experience.
- **Service Automation / Automatizare**: Workflow and business process automation — reducing costs, eliminating errors, increasing efficiency.
- **API & Integrations / API & Integrări**: Connecting business systems with third-party services: payment processors, shipping carriers, invoicing software, CRM tools.
- **IT Consulting / Consultanță IT**: Technical strategy, architecture planning, and technology selection guidance.

## Technologies Used

React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, AWS, Redis, Tailwind CSS, GraphQL, Prisma, Stripe

- Email: hello@cst-systems.ro

- Website: https://cst-systems.ro
- Languages: Romanian (default), English

## Business Hours

Monday–Friday: 09:00–18:00 (EET/EEST, UTC+2/UTC+3)

## About

Founded and operating in Târgu Mureș, Romania. Working with clients from Romania,
Europe and internationally. All projects include post-launch support.
Fluent in Romanian and English.
